components.name: Working: mix A+B 1:1, add 3 µL 30% H₂O₂ per 10 mL

notes.en: Mix A+B 1:1 just before use. Add H₂O₂ last. Solutions stable months at 4°C. Cost ~1/50 of commercial. p-Coumaric acid enhances signal 10-fold.
notes.zh: 使用前 1:1 混合 A、B 液。最后加 H₂O₂。母液 4°C 可保存数月。成本约商品化试剂的 1/50。

usage.en: Chemiluminescent substrate for HRP-based Western blot signal detection.
usage.zh: HRP 化学发光底物，用于 Western blot 信号检测。

prepSteps.step: Prepare Solution A: dissolve luminol in Tris-HCl pH 8.5 with p-coumaric acid enhancer.
Prepare Solution B: dilute 30% H₂O₂ in Tris-HCl pH 8.5.
prepSteps.warning: 30% H₂O₂ is a strong oxidizer — handle with care.

prepSteps.step: Mix Solution A and Solution B 1:1 immediately before use.
Store Solutions A and B separately at 4°C protected from light.
Mixed working solution must be used within 1 hour.
